name_cn:
『Burberry』
🔥🔥Burberry runway shoulder bag, featuring a slim and structured silhouette, curved design🤩🤩with gold-plated accessories, and an external slip pocket and zip pocket for easy access. Model: 6602-1, Size: 26 x 5.5 x 15cm
